• A safety backup is automatically created before any restore operation
• Application restart may be required after restoring a full backup
• Backup size depends on the amount of photos and documents you have uploaded
• Full backups include your entire database and all uploaded files
• Restoring a full backup will OVERWRITE all current data and files
